description: Set the tolerance for geometric manipulations. For instance, if the distance between two points is less than f they will be treated as one point (merged). The tolerance value f must be positive. Invoking the command will set off the auto-tolerance flag (see building-blocks set auto-tolerance ).

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Set the tolerance for geometric manipulations. For instance, if the distance between two points is less than f they will be treated as one point (merged). The tolerance value f must be positive. Invoking the command will set off the auto-tolerance flag (see building-blocks set auto-tolerance).
